ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the profile belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the profile */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_once" (
  "profile_once_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile once entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the profile once entry belongs to */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* UTM source for the user */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* UTM medium for the user */,
  "utm_campaign" TEXT /* UTM campaign for the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the profile once entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the profile once entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_once_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_once_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unsubscribed" (
  "unsubscribed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unsubscribe entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the unsubscribe entry belongs to */,
  "unsubscribed" INTEGER /* Whether the user is unsubscribed from marketing messages */,
  "unsubscribed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user unsubscribed */,
  "unsubscribed_by" TEXT /* User who unsubscribed the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unsubscribed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unsubscribed_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing message */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the marketing message was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the marketing message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketing message was sent */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was opened */,
  "clicked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was clicked */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the message */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_messages_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views for the user */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the user */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "bounced_at" TEXT /* Timestamp if the user bounced */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the analytics entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the detail belongs to */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the detail belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the report detail */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report detail */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
